title: Cute Pastel Solar Sword
description: Resource pack changing netherite sword through renaming on an anvil
body:
Resource pack changing netherite sword through renaming on an anvil

The netherite sword needs to be called “solar sword”, you also need an optifine for the resource pack to work correctly, or the mods that replace it

![Sword in hand 3rd person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/327bb7d9da84c3a8b0f56293efc88787ed68b5b1.png)
